risk_title: Refugee enrollment and completion tracking gaps
risk_summary: The project targets refugees as a key vulnerable group but has zero reported enrollment and completion data for refugees across multiple indicators, with comments indicating data will be gathered in future reporting periods. This represents a significant implementation gap for a core project objective.
evidence_quote: Increased enrollment in selected TVET areas - Refugees (Number) 220.00 0 0 800.00... Share of trainees completing TVET programs increased - Refugees (Percentage) Comments on achieving targets This data is currently not available but will be gathered before the next ISR.

risk_title: Persons with disabilities enrollment and completion tracking gaps
risk_summary: The project explicitly targets persons with disabilities but reports zero enrollment and completion across multiple indicators, with data collection still pending. This affects a core vulnerable group targeted by the project's development objective.
evidence_quote: Increased enrollment in selected TVET areas - Persons with disabilities (Number) 47.00 0 0 160.00... Share of trainees completing TVET programs increased - Persons with disabilities (Percentage) Comments on achieving targets This data is currently not available but will be gathered before the next ISR.

risk_title: Refugee employment outcomes not being tracked
risk_summary: Employment outcomes for refugees at 6 and 9 months post-completion show zero data collection, with comments indicating data will be gathered later. This prevents monitoring of a key PDO indicator for a vulnerable population.
evidence_quote: Share of trainees employed 6 months after completion of their programs in similar sectors - Refugees (Percentage) 5.00 0 0 50.00 Comments on achieving targets This data is currently not available but will be gathered before the next ISR.

risk_title: Online gig work component stalled due to technical and coordination constraints
risk_summary: A planned training component for online gig work engagement has achieved zero results and is being deleted during restructuring due to significant implementation delays, partly attributed to technical constraints and coordination issues with implementing partners.
evidence_quote: IRI # 3: Number of individuals engaged in Online Gig Work (disaggregated by gender, disability and refugee status) (Number) Comments on achieving targets During the upcoming restructuring, this indicator will be deleted due to significant delays in the implementation of the corresponding activity. As of the mid-term review, no concrete action had yet been taken, partly due to technical constraints and coordination with implementing partners.

risk_summary: Bilateral labor agreements and short-term migrant worker targets remain at zero with no progress toward the 250-person target. This suggests potential governance or diplomatic barriers to implementing labor mobility components.
evidence_quote: IRI # 4: Number of Bilateral Labor Agreements signed (Number) 0.00 0 0 6.00... IRI # 5: Annual number of short-term migrant workers from Djibouti 0.00 0 0 250.00
